title: EIL Partners with CSIR-IIP to Establish 20 KLPD Bio-ATF Plant for MRPL
content: Engineers India Limited (EIL) is partnering with the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research â€“ Indian Institute of Petroleum (CSIR-IIP) to set up the countryâ€™s first bio-aviation turbine fuel (bio-ATF) plant at the Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) facility. The upcoming 20-kilolitres-per-day (KLPD) bio-vegetable oil-based Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) plant marks a significant step towards cleaner alternatives in the aviation sector
author: Analysts Account
